label: IoT Raw Event Publisher
info: Publishes a minimal raw_iot_event to iot/raw/node1 every 10 seconds

name: Build raw_iot_event
func:
var now = new Date().toISOString();
msg.payload = JSON.stringify({
    "schema_version": "1.0",
    "event_type": "raw_iot_event",
    "timestamp": now,
    "node_id": "sensor-a1",
    "gateway_id": "node1",
    "node_group": "room-a",
    "device_type": "thermostat",
    "src_ip": "10.10.1.21",
    "dst_ip": "10.10.0.10",
    "src_port": 51544,
    "dst_port": 443,
    "protocol": "tcp",
    "packet_size": 820,
    "packet_count": 6,
    "duration_ms": 85,
    "bytes_in": 920,
    "bytes_out": 3980,
    "flags": {"syn": 1, "ack": 0, "psh": 0, "fin": 0, "rst": 0, "urg": 0},
    "flag_counts": {"syn": 1, "ack": 0, "psh": 0, "fin": 0, "rst": 0, "urg": 0},
    "scenario": "normal_traffic"
});
return msg;
